headline: Samsung workers set to strike at worst possible time
summary: Samsung workers plan an 18-day strike due to bonus payment disputes. The strike targets domestic chipmaking plants. This action raises concerns over already constrained memory chip production.

headline: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
summary: Mercedes unveiled its new electric AMG GT 4-door coupe, a super sedan. It can accelerate from 0-60 mph in a blistering 2 seconds. The EV incorporates advanced technology from the automaker's XX concept.

headline: Wear OS 7 will keep track of deliveries and sports scores on your wrist
summary: Google announced Wear OS 7, the next major smartwatch update. It will introduce iPhone-style Live Updates for timely information. Users can track deliveries and sports scores directly from their wrist.

headline: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year
summary: Plex is tripling the price of its lifetime pass to $750. Customers have until July 1st to purchase at the current rate. This comes after the price was doubled just last year.

headline: Open-World Lord of Rings RPG and New Kingdom Come Game Confirmed in Development at Warhorse Studios
summary: Warhorse Studios confirmed two major game titles are in development. These include an open-world Lord of the Rings RPG. A new Kingdom Come game is also officially underway.

headline: Embracer 'Actively Exploring' External Partnerships for the Likes of Saints Row, Deus Ex, TimeSplitters, and More
summary: Embracer Group is seeking external partnerships for its game franchises. This includes popular titles like Saints Row, Deus Ex, and TimeSplitters. They are also establishing Fellowship Entertainment for Lord of the Rings and Tomb Raider expansion.

headline: Hasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game from Star Wars Jedi: Survivor Director
summary: Hasbro has canceled a new Dungeons & Dragons game. The project was being led by Stig Asmussen, director of Star Wars Jedi: Survivor. This marks a significant cancellation for the tabletop giant.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Shows Off No-HUD Option
summary: The upcoming remake, Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, has been showcased. It will feature a customizable no-HUD option for players. This allows for a more immersive gameplay experience.

headline: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
summary: Supermarkets are resisting government pressure to cap essential food prices. A minister confirmed discussions regarding price caps took place. There will be no mandatory cap on milk, bread, and eggs prices.

headline: Inflation falls to 2.8% but is expected to rise from here
summary: Inflation has dropped to 2.8%, a welcome decrease. Lower energy prices and government support contributed to the fall. However, experts predict inflation will likely rise again soon.

headline: Arsenal fans and players celebrate title at Emirates at 5am
summary: Arsenal fans and players celebrated a long-awaited title victory. The celebrations took place at the Emirates Stadium in the early hours. This marks the club's first title celebration in 22 years.

headline: Kylie Minogue reveals she had second cancer diagnosis in 2021
summary: Kylie Minogue revealed a second cancer diagnosis in 2021. She shared the personal news in a new documentary. Minogue confirmed she successfully overcame the illness once again.
